text: What if the future of our food is locked away in a vault? Seed banks are like time capsules, preserving plant diversity for generations. But, did you know many seeds may not stay viable for long? Scientists debate how long seeds can truly last, some say decades, others worry about just years. Seed banks hold our agricultural heritage, but questions remain about their effectiveness. Are we doing enough? Want to learn more about how to protect our planet's future? Follow for more insights!
